Module businesslogic_api_module
Package io.github.fontysvenlo.ais.businesslogic.api

Interface CustomerManager

public interface CustomerManager
Interface for objects that are able to manage Customers.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method

    CustomerData
    add(CustomerData customerData)
    Add a customer.

    • add

      CustomerData add(CustomerData customerData)

      Parameters:

      List<CustomerData> list()
      Retrieve all customers.
